title: Alarm Handler
excerpt: description: Schedule future wake-ups for Durable Objects using the Alarms API with guaranteed at-least-once execution. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/durable-objects/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Durable Objects alarms allow you to schedule the Durable Object to be woken up at a time in the future. When the alarm's scheduled time comes, the `alarm()` handler method will be called. Alarms are modified using the Storage API, and alarm operations follow the same rules as other storage operations. * Each Durable Object is able to schedule a single alarm at a time by calling `setAlarm()`.
